acquisition method: Peptides were selected for fragmentation automatically by data dependant analysis.
cleavage agent: Samples were digested with trypsin overnight at 37 °C.
fractionation method: The conditioned medium from human iPSC-derived neurons was subjected to size exclusion chromatography to isolate EVs.
instrument: using an Orbitrap Elite (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA) mass spectrometer.
labeling: Proteomic analysis was able to identify CD9 in the EV sample, but not in the cell fraction.
reduction reagent: boiled for 5 min in 5× SDS-PAGE sample buffer containing DTT.
